metadata.title: Vibes Europe — Initiatives that make life easier
metadata.description: Vibes Europe develops initiatives with market specialists to make life easier, solve problems, and help communities.
metadata.projectsDescription: Explore the initiatives built by Vibes Europe — from harvest trips to mental health platforms.

hero.subtitle: We partner with specialists to build meaningful projects — solving real problems, supporting communities, and creating impact across Europe.

mission.title: What drives us
mission.subtitle: Every initiative starts with the same question: how can we make this better?

pillars.title: Help communities
pillars.description: We identify communities that need support and build initiatives that create lasting, positive change.

pillars.title: Make life easier
pillars.description: From complex problems to simple solutions — we find the friction points and eliminate them.

pillars.title: Work with specialists
pillars.description: We partner with experts from the market who bring deep domain knowledge to every initiative we launch.

approach.title: How we work
approach.subtitle: Vibes Europe is where initiative meets expertise. We don't just invest — we actively build alongside the specialists who make each project succeed.

steps.title: Identify
steps.description: We spot opportunities where communities or industries need a better solution — whether it's a gap in services, an underserved group, or a broken process.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: We bring together the right specialists — people with hands-on experience and deep domain knowledge who share our drive to build something meaningful.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Together we develop the initiative from idea to reality, combining entrepreneurial speed with specialist expertise to create lasting impact.

projectsSection.title: Our initiatives
projectsSection.subtitle: Each project is built with dedicated specialists who bring passion and expertise to their domain.

projectsPage.title: Our projects
projectsPage.subtitle: Each initiative is a collaboration between Vibes Europe and dedicated specialists who bring deep domain expertise to solve meaningful problems.
projectsPage.ctaSubtitle: We're always open to new partnerships and ideas that make a real difference.

sweatAndSoil.title: Sweat & Soil
sweatAndSoil.shortDescription: Harvest trips that connect sports communities with Mediterranean farmers — combining nature, exercise, and meaningful work.
sweatAndSoil.description: Harvest trips that connect sports communities with Mediterranean farmers. Participants combine physical activity with meaningful agricultural work — picking olives, harvesting grapes, and building connections with local producers.
highlights: Multi-day harvest experiences in the Mediterranean
Designed for sports teams, clubs, and active communities
Supporting local farmers and sustainable agriculture

intervisio.title: Intervisio
intervisio.shortDescription: A platform for multidisciplinary peer consultation (intervisie) — connecting healthcare professionals across disciplines to learn from each other and improve care together.
intervisio.description: A platform for multidisciplinary peer consultation (intervisie) — connecting healthcare professionals across disciplines to learn from each other and improve the quality of care together.
highlights: Building stronger cross-discipline networks in healthcare

comingSoon.title: What's next?
comingSoon.shortDescription: We're always exploring new initiatives where we can make a difference. Have an idea or a community that needs support?
comingSoon.description: We're always looking for the next meaningful initiative — places where we can partner with specialists to solve real problems and support communities that need it. Our pipeline is active and growing.
highlights: Focused on making life easier for real people
Always looking for passionate specialist partners
Open to ideas — reach out if you see an opportunity

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Whether you have an idea for a new initiative, want to collaborate as a specialist, or just want to learn more — we'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Building initiatives with specialists to make life easier, solve problems, and support communities across Europe.
